#  Export a List of Change Orders to CSV or PDF 
##  Background 
You can export a list of your project's Prime Contract Change Orders (PCCOs) or Commitment Change Orders (CCOs) from the Change Orders tool.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Change Orders tool.
  * **Supported Export File Formats:**
    * Comma Separate Values (CSV)
    * Portable Document Format (PDF)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * The options in the Export menu only export the contents of the active tab.
    * The filters and options in effect on the page are applied to the export file.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Commitment Change Order (CCO)](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/materials-user-guide-with-financials/create-a-change-order-cco)  
OR
  * [Create a Prime Contract Change Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-a-prime-contract-change-order)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Change Orders** tool.
  2. Click the **Prime Contracts** or **Commitments** tab.
  3. Add any filters to narrow the data in the list.
  4. Click a column header to apply the desired sort order on the list.
  5. Choose one of these options:
     * **Export > CSV**. Exports data to the Comma Separated Values (CSV) format.
     * **Export > PDF**. Exports data to the Portable Document Format (PDF).


## See Also
  * [Which tools can I extract project data from using the Procore Extracts application?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-tools-can-i-extract-project-data-from-using-the-procore-extracts-application)
title: Export a List of Change Orders to CSV or PDF
description: To export a list of change orders to the CSV or PDF file format from the project's Change Orders tool.
